title: hyptis brevipes
intro: Hyptis brevipes, also known as Short-stemmed Hyptis, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hyptis brevipes include relief from digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Hyptis brevipes can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
